art_highlights: New Museum in NYC reopens with a major $82 million expansion.
Baton Rouge's LASM hosts 'Then, and Now, and Always: The Art of Nick Bustamante'.
Lagos, Nigeria launches 'Wake Up!' contemporary art exhibition at Angels & Muse.
25th Biennale of Sydney 'Rememory' continues to explore themes of memory and survival.
V&A Museum in London features 'Schiaparelli: Fashion Becomes Art'.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Negative; global markets volatile due to escalating Iran conflict and oil price spikes.
market_summary.key_drivers: US-Iran conflict, Strait of Hormuz closure concerns, surging energy prices (Brent $107/bbl), and renewed inflation fears.
market_summary.trend: Major U.S. indices (Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq) hit multi-week lows; global markets show signs of 'peak uncertainty' with forced liquidations.
